eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Juab, UT; at 11:45 AM on JUN 28, 2026 Effective until 11:45 AM JUN 29, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Juab CO EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT- Iron/Cherry Fire. The Mammoth, Silver City, Eureka, Tintic Junction is downgraded from a GO status to a SET status. Significant danger; voluntary evacuation in effect. Leave at any time if you feel unsafe. Stay alert and watch local news and cell phone alerts. Make sure your emergency kit is packed and ready to go by the door or in your car. Be ready to leave at a moment's notice. Confirm your plan with family and loved ones, and check on neighbors who may need help. Leave now if you can or if you feel unsafe
